item.title: U.S. Department of Energy invests in Fermilab projects to accelerate AI-enabled scientific discovery
item.description: The awards will support Fermilab projects by leveraging AI to boost innovation and technology development, advance DOE’s Genesis Mission and accelerate scientific discovery.

item.description: Here is a complete guide to MSC 2026 at the Esports World Cup, including match results, schedules, and key information.

item.title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
item.description: Medical device leaders are already building on NVIDIA’s new Medical Physics Simulation framework — giving surgical robots the virtual experience they need before interacting with patients.

item.title: Prime Video announces Lily Allen documentary, coming to streaming in 2027
item.description: The upcoming film will chart the life and work of Lily Allen, from her early years through to 'West End Girl.'

item.title: Powering America's Genesis Mission: Microsoft's commitment to scientific discovery - The Official Microsoft Blog
item.description: Today, we’re excited to share a long-term commitment to the Department of Energy’s (DOE) Genesis Mission, backed by a $60 million investment designed to accelerate AI for science and the breakthroughs it can deliver for the country. This deepened commitment includes Microsoft’s new Scientific Partnership Advancing Research & Knowledge coordination hub and program office, otherwise...

item.description: GW SIG Seminar on LISA Preparatory Science and LISA Science Gaps. Speakers: Ira Thorpe, NASA LISA Project Scientist, and Ann Hornschemeier Cardiff, NASA LISA Deputy Project Scientist

item.title: Journal retracts breast cancer paper 10 years after sleuth flagged issues
item.description: A biomedical journal has retracted a paper by a cancer researcher who sued her former institution over misconduct allegations. The action comes a decade after a sleuth first raised concerns about t…

item.title: Planetary Intelligence, AI for the 21st Century Earth: Will Marshall's Case for a Smarter Planet
item.description: A new image of every point on the Earth’s landmass, captured once every 24 hours, with the ability to zoom in on specific locations at higher resolution.

item.title: A Week of Smoky Skies Across North America - NASA Science
item.description: Brown carbon, emitted by wildland fires and tracked over the span of a week in July 2026, worsened air quality in parts of the U.S. and Canada.

item.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
item.description: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.

item.description: Data from the Earth-orbiting U.S.-India NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) satellite’s L-band radar was used to produce an image of Nunatak

item.title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
item.description: We shared how Samsung users can boost productivity and get time back on new foldables, watches, and glasses coming soon.

item.title: Ruthenium nanoparticles convert captured perchlorate into harmless chloride in water treatment waste
item.description: For decades, water utilities have relied on giant tanks filled with ion-exchange resin beads to remove perchlorate, a harmful industrial pollutant, from drinking water. The system works by attracting negatively charged perchlorate ions to positively charged resin beads, allowing purified water to flow out of the tanks. But the process leaves behind a difficult problem: resin beads loaded with perchlorate that must be regenerated or disposed of as hazardous waste.

item.title: Built in Fort Worth: Wistron Opens Advanced Manufacturing Plant to Produce NVIDIA AI Systems
item.description: The AI era runs on AI infrastructure. Many of these advanced systems are built and tested in Texas. Wistron opened its first U.S. manufacturing facility today in Fort Worth — a 324,000-square-foot greenfield plant producing superchips at the heart of some of the world’s most capable AI systems. In front of an audience of Wistron […]

item.title: I am not convinced that hunting for AI is going to solve esports' biggest issues
item.description: With Mobile Legends: Bang Bang recently accused of having AI in its menu, I got to thinking: Who cares really? Is it impacting esports?

item.title: What do people in middle-income countries think about cuts to U.S. humanitarian aid?
item.description: In 16 middle-income countries surveyed, many people are unsure how U.S. humanitarian aid cuts will affect them, though those with opinions lean negative.

item.title: U.S. foreign aid is plunging in second Trump administration
item.description: U.S. foreign aid fell to its lowest inflation-adjusted level in over two decades in fiscal 2025, dropping to $47.3 billion — more than $24 billion less than the prior year.

item.title: Overwatch reveals Shion's original face and Hashimoto elders in new story
item.description: Overwatch's new Shion short story titled "Ambush" revealed Shion's original omnic form plus the names and personalities of the Hashimoto elders.

item.description: Proposing a new metric for whether AI does what you actually want

item.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
item.description: Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber to help defenders find, validate, and patch software vulnerabilities quickly and efficiently.

item.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
item.description: Backed by 300 global partners, Vera Rubin is ramping up worldwide. NVIDIA partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Mistral are among many deploying Vera Rubin, which delivers benchmark leadership on performance per watt and lowest token costs.

item.title: MLBB backtracks after fans outrage over AI-generated main menu in advanced server
item.description: Fans are upset about the recent MLBB Advanced Server update that adds a 3D model of Layla that seems to be generated by AI.

item.title: Saudia unveils esports-branded plane for EWC 2026's Paris debut
item.description: Saudia's expanded deal with the Esports Foundation includes a specially branded plane flying daily between Riyadh and Paris for the duration of EWC 2026.

item.title: A New Compact Instrument Enables High-Fidelity Measurements of Energetic Particles on CubeSats - NASA Science
item.description: “Most CubeSats can observe particles from only a single direction, so they have to spin in order to build up a full picture — and that takes a few seconds,

item.title: Broad Institute, Boston Children’s Hospital, and The Jackson Laboratory launch the Center for Therapeutic Genetics, a non-profit effort to develop genetic medicines for rare and ultra-rare diseases
item.description: The new collaboration aims to develop precision medicines, including base and prime editing, to treat patients with rare diseases, using infrastructure and repeatable practices the center will share with others. div.hero-section__author { display:none;}

item.title: BLG Bin to take a temporary break amid health concerns
item.description: Due to health concerns, BLG top laner Bin will be taking a break from competitive League of Legends ahead of LPL Split 3.

item.title: Team Vitality signs BYD as official vehicle partner for summer 2026
item.description: BYD France and Team Vitality have confirmed a new vehicle supply deal covering rosters across Rocket League, Tekken 8, Teamfight Tactics, and several other titles for the summer period.

item.title: Exclusive: Medical student in Nepal behind busy research factory
item.description: A second-year medical student in Nepal is at the center of an international research network churning out everything from systematic reviews and meta-analyses to case reports and database studies, …

item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Season 3 has six new fighters — and a character identity crisis
item.description: SNK unveiled a relentless Season 3 schedule for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves, but a growing chorus of competitive players argues that more characters won't fix the game's "sauce" problem.

item.title: New Overwatch Lucio skin enters Heroes of the Storm!
item.description: The Ruby Chromesthesia Lucio skin can now be unlocked in Heroes of the Storm. The patch also introduces the mighty Slapathur ability!

item.title: ECB appoints Boris Kisselevsky as Director General Secretariat
item.description: Our monetary policy strategy, the tools we use and the impact they have

item.title: July 2026 euro area bank lending survey
item.description: Our monetary policy strategy, the tools we use and the impact they have

item.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves has an insane DLC schedule, but it may not be enough to bring the sauce
item.description: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves devs are going ham with the DLC, dropping tons of characters. But do they have the sauce?

item.title: Molecules stop carbon nanotubes clumping, unlocking record heat-to-electricity performance
item.description: QUT researchers have overcome a challenge that has limited next-generation energy-harvesting materials for more than two decades, opening the door to more powerful wearable electronics and new ways of turning wasted heat into electricity. The breakthrough centers on carbon nanotubes, which are flexible, conductive microscopic rods that have long shown promise for wearable technologies but have been difficult to control.

item.title: Carbon nanotube model reveals how smart sensors perform at aircraft-like extremes
item.description: Researchers from Skoltech, in collaboration with the Harbin Institute of Technology and Jiangsu University (China), have published a study presenting the first empirical model to explain and predict the sensing behavior of hierarchical tri-phase carbon nanotube systems across a wide temperature range (from -170°C (-274°F) to 90°C (194°F)). The study has been published in the Carbon journal.

item.title: NASA-Funded Study Shows How Controlled Burns Help Sequoias Survive Wildfires - NASA Science
item.description: A new study, funded by NASA, found that giant sequoias were nearly four times more likely to survive extreme wildfires in forests that have been managed with prescribed burns, which decrease tree mortality.

item.title: Acid-resistant nanocage shows promise for targeted gastric cancer therapy
item.description: Researchers from the Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, National University of Singapore (NUS Medicine), have developed a swallowable nanoscale delivery platform designed to transport therapeutic enzymes through the stomach's acidic environment and activate a cancer-killing reaction at tumor sites. Early preclinical findings suggest that the approach may offer a new strategy for treating gastric cancer more precisely while reducing damage to healthy tissue.

item.title: Fortnite's latest Sprite trailer features an 'Obsession' crossover – could skins be next?
item.description: Fortnite skins based on the film Obsession have become a real possibility following a recent collaboration with the film!

item.title: IEEE Program Helps Girls In India See a Future In STEM
item.description: Hands-on projects and role models open doors for STEM careers

item.title: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows yet after PlayTime's scandal at the Esports World Cup
item.description: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.
